description: Renovate is scoped to the Gradle/Android project ONLY. The Scala side is handled by scala-steward.yml, and the rest of the polyglot repo (npm, Docker, GitHub Actions) is intentionally left alone — so we whitelist just the two Gradle managers below. Widen enabledManagers if you ever want Renovate to own those too.

packageRules.description: The Compose compiler plugin and the kotlinx-serialization plugin are version-locked to the Kotlin release (the Compose plugin in particular MUST equal the Kotlin version, currently 2.4.0). Bump them in one PR so they never drift apart. (AGP 9 bundles the Kotlin Gradle plugin, so there is no standalone org.jetbrains.kotlin.android entry to include.)
androidx.lifecycle artifacts share a version (currently 2.11.0) and are meant to move together.
okhttp + mockwebserver are the same com.squareup.okhttp3 release (5.4.0) and must move in lockstep, or the test artifact won't resolve against the main one.
kotlinx-coroutines-android + kotlinx-coroutines-test share the coroutines version (1.11.0) and must bump together.
